# epilot-datasource Provider

360-native-journeys API: API to configure 360-native-journeys

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    epilot-datasource = {
      source  = "epilot-dev/epilot-datasource"
      version = "0.30.4"
    }
  }
}

provider "epilot-datasource" {
  server_url = "..." # Optional
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `epilot_auth` (String, Sensitive) Epilot Authorization Bearer Token - public access token / user token.
- `portal_auth` (String, Sensitive) Authorization header with customer portal OAuth2 bearer token.
- `server_url` (String) Server URL (defaults to https://epilot360-native-journeys.sls.epilot.io)
